meaning: n.锡兰(印度以南一岛国,现以更名为斯里兰卡Srilanka,首都为科伦坡Colombo)
examples: One of the main places in Asia where the elephant lives is the island of Ceylon.
The graphite is mined in Ceylon.
Note that there is no new keyword in Ceylon.
The story unfolds in absorbing, convincingly re-created settings: Paris (including its notorious sewers), Cairo, Shanghai and Ceylon.
For example, one setting in this book is Ceylon, now called Sri Lanka, a major tea-growing region.
